issues_found.description: 3 template placeholders literal in published HTML: {{V51_NO_MONITOR}}, {{V51_POST_HOC}}, {{V51_NO_DERIVE}}. These appear in data/sections.json (part2.html) but are not in generate-html.js's substitution map. Computed values: V51_NO_MONITOR=27, V51_POST_HOC=31, V51_NO_DERIVE=31 (out of 32 new_in_v51 WINs).
issues_found.suggested_fix: Add to generate-html.js substitution map: '{{V51_NO_MONITOR}}': wins.filter(w=>w.new_in_v51&&w.code_analysis?.monitoring==='none').length, '{{V51_POST_HOC}}': wins.filter(w=>w.new_in_v51&&w.code_analysis?.post_hoc).length, '{{V51_NO_DERIVE}}': wins.filter(w=>w.new_in_v51&&w.code_analysis?.derives_from_dome===false).length. Then rebuild.
